nasb.text: Is this man Coniah a despised, shattered jar? Or is he an undesirable vessel? Why have he and his descendants been hurled out And cast into a land that they had not known?

esv.text: Is this man Coniah a despised, broken pot, a vessel no one cares for? Why are he and his children hurled and cast into a land that they do not know?

cnv.text: 哥尼雅這個人是被鄙視、 被摔碎的瓶子， 是沒有人喜悅的器皿嗎？ 他和他的後裔為甚麼被驅趕， 被拋棄到他們不認識的地去呢？

ccb.text: 难道哥尼雅是个被人鄙视、无人理睬的破瓶子吗？ 为什么他和他的子孙被赶到陌生之地？
